narrative:
Precinct Ironton 4I (precinct in Lawrence County) has 324 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
